tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose metabolism or prediabetes. Creatinine is slightly below normal, which is generally not clinically significant in isolation. Chloride is marginally elevated but likely not of concern without other electrolyte disturbances. All other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend monitoring glycemic control and clinical correlation for any symptoms.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
